notes: Mixed, Mastered, and Polished - Faster, lighter background metadata loading (shared Tralbum API + caching). Large playlists now do less redundant network work.
• Credits - Thanks to tobias-d (github.com/tobias-d) and their bandcamp-player-extension project for API-first metadata insights.
• Faster loading - Tracklists and titles now load almost instantly improving perceived load times and notification accuracy.
• Faster imports - Custom domain (vanity URL) imports are significantly quicker.
• Smarter playlists - Playlist entries' Album and artist metadata now upgrades during thumbnail fetch not just on individiual URL load
• Smoother notifications - Reduce flicker option, in-place toast updates, and seamless artwork without pop-in.
• Improved menus - Load Album List now reopens automatically after edits (rename/delete) for faster batch changes.
• Better visuals - Image Viewer progress animation now matches Regular Mode; improved cover art selection and cache validation.
• More reliable loading - Thumbnail retrieval hardened with retries; fewer stalls on large playlists and imports.
• Faster bulk actions - Large playlist deletes now batch saves, keeping the app responsive.
• Smoother themes - Prevents dark flash between album transitions by holding previous palette until next loads.
• Better playback state - Pre-release albums now show a clean 'Nothing to Play Yet' state instead of failed autoplay.
• Cleanup - Reduced unnecessary console and error log noise.
